summary: Cash Payment Fraud Prevention Feature - FULLY WORKING. Client-initiated cash payments create 'pending_confirmation' status. Cashback is NOT credited until merchant confirms. Merchant can confirm/reject payments. Max 3 pending limit enforced. 72-hour expiration. SMS notification on rejection.

minor.issue: Returns 422 instead of 401 when called without auth (minor - validation happens before auth check)

critical_code_review_comments: Cash payment flow properly implements fraud prevention with pending_confirmation status
Merchant dashboard Cash tab shows pending confirmations with Confirm/Reject buttons
Client history shows 'Awaiting Confirmation' badge for pending cash payments
Max 3 pending limit per customer correctly enforced
72-hour expiration time shown on pending transactions
SMS notification sent to customer on payment rejection

success_rate.backend: 100% - All cash payment fraud prevention APIs working
success_rate.frontend: 100% - Merchant Cash tab and Client Transaction History fully functional

seed_data_creation: 3 pending cash payment confirmations created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cash payment fraud prevention feature complete. Key endpoints: POST /api/payments/merchant/cash (creates pending_confirmation), GET /api/merchants/pending-confirmations (list pending), POST /api/merchants/confirm-cash-payment/{id} (confirm), POST /api/merchants/reject-cash-payment/{id} (reject). Max 3 pending per customer, 72h expiration. Client balance: 1.57 GHS. Merchant: Test Shop Ghana (TESTSHOP001).

client_cash_payment_creates_pending.returns: status: pending_confirmation, expires_at, cashback_amount (not credited yet)

cashback_not_credited_immediately.detail: Client balance does NOT increase until merchant confirms

merchant_sees_pending_confirmations.returns: pending_count, transactions[] with client_name, amount, cashback_amount, expires_at

merchant_confirm_payment.returns: success: true, cashback credited to client

merchant_reject_payment.returns: success: true, SMS notification sent, no cashback credited

max_3_pending_limit.detail: 4th pending payment fails with 'You have 3 pending cash payments awaiting confirmation'

client_sees_awaiting_status.detail: Transaction History shows 'Awaiting Confirmation' badge with '+X.XX pending' cashback

merchant_ui_pending_confirmations.detail: Cash tab shows: Today's Payments stats, Pending Confirmations with Confirm Receipt/Reject buttons, expires in Xh
